P01_CLINICAL_AUTOMATION_BIAS: (("automation bias"[Title/Abstract] OR "trust in automation"[Title/Abstract] OR overreliance[Title/Abstract] OR underreliance[Title/Abstract] OR "appropriate reliance"[Title/Abstract]) AND (clinical[Title/Abstract] OR medical[Title/Abstract] OR health[Title/Abstract] OR diagnosis[Title/Abstract] OR prescribing[Title/Abstract]))
P02_CLINICAL_XAI_TRUST_RELIANCE: ((("explainable artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "AI explanation"[Title/Abstract] OR "machine learning explanation"[Title/Abstract] OR "algorithmic explanation"[Title/Abstract]) AND (trust[Title/Abstract] OR reliance[Title/Abstract] OR decision[Title/Abstract] OR verification[Title/Abstract])) AND (human[Title/Abstract] OR participant[Title/Abstract] OR clinician[Title/Abstract] OR physician[Title/Abstract] OR patient[Title/Abstract]))
P03_CLINICAL_DECISION_SUPPORT_HUMAN: (("clinical decision support"[Title/Abstract] OR "AI-assisted decision"[Title/Abstract] OR "artificial intelligence decision support"[Title/Abstract] OR "machine learning decision support"[Title/Abstract]) AND (physician[Title/Abstract] OR clinician[Title/Abstract] OR nurse[Title/Abstract] OR "medical student"[Title/Abstract] OR patient[Title/Abstract]) AND (experiment[Title/Abstract] OR trial[Title/Abstract] OR participant[Title/Abstract] OR study[Title/Abstract]))
P04_SYMPTOM_CHECKER_EXPLANATION: (("symptom checker"[Title/Abstract] OR "digital symptom assessment"[Title/Abstract]) AND (explanation[Title/Abstract] OR trust[Title/Abstract] OR reliance[Title/Abstract] OR decision[Title/Abstract]))
P05_DIAGNOSTIC_AI_EXPLANATION: (((radiology[Title/Abstract] OR dermatology[Title/Abstract] OR pathology[Title/Abstract] OR oncology[Title/Abstract] OR screening[Title/Abstract]) AND ("artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR "machine learning"[Title/Abstract])) AND (explanation[Title/Abstract] OR explainable[Title/Abstract] OR trust[Title/Abstract] OR reliance[Title/Abstract]) AND (human[Title/Abstract] OR clinician[Title/Abstract] OR physician[Title/Abstract] OR participant[Title/Abstract]))
P06_COGNITIVE_LOAD_AUTOMATION: (("cognitive load"[Title/Abstract] OR "task complexity"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("automation bias"[Title/Abstract] OR "decision support"[Title/Abstract] OR "automated advice"[Title/Abstract]))
P07_UNCERTAINTY_TRUST_CALIBRATION: (((uncertainty[Title/Abstract] OR confidence[Title/Abstract] OR calibration[Title/Abstract]) AND (display[Title/Abstract] OR presentation[Title/Abstract] OR communication[Title/Abstract])) AND (trust[Title/Abstract] OR reliance[Title/Abstract]) AND ("artificial intelligence"[Title/Abstract] OR algorithm[Title/Abstract] OR automation[Title/Abstract]))
P08_CLINICAL_AI_GOVERNANCE_BEHAVIOR: (((verification[Title/Abstract] OR oversight[Title/Abstract] OR accountability[Title/Abstract] OR delegation[Title/Abstract] OR review[Title/Abstract]) AND ("clinical AI"[Title/Abstract] OR "medical AI"[Title/Abstract] OR "clinical decision support"[Title/Abstract])) AND (human[Title/Abstract] OR clinician[Title/Abstract] OR physician[Title/Abstract]))
